posts.content: I was born in Yangdu, Langya. As a boy I moved to Jingzhou with my uncle—in chaos I clung to one thing: learn, know people, then find my footing.
posts.translation: 我生于琅琊阳都。少年时随叔父迁荆州，乱世里我只信一事：修学、识人，而后安身立命。

posts.content: I farmed in my thatched cottage at Longzhong, seeking only to survive the chaos. But Lord Liu visited me thrice; moved by his sincerity, I presented the Longzhong Plan: occupy Jing and Yi provinces, ally with Wu against Cao, and wait for the world to change.
posts.translation: 我于隆中草庐躬耕，本欲苟全性命于乱世。然刘先主三顾臣于草庐之中，感其诚意，我终献上“隆中对”：跨有荆、益，联吴抗曹，静待天下有变。

posts.content: Cao Cao's massive army pressed south, and Lord Liu was in peril. I went alone to Eastern Wu, debated their scholars at Chaisang, and convinced Sun Quan to join us. The fires of Red Cliffs forged the first shape of the Three Kingdoms.
posts.translation: 曹操大军压境，刘先主危在旦夕。我只身前往东吴，在柴桑舌战群儒，说服孙权合力。赤壁一把大火，烧出了这天下三分的雏形。

posts.content: I drafted edicts when Liu Bei declared himself emperor of Shu—paper seals meant nothing without grain routes secured.
posts.translation: 先主称帝蜀汉时我草诏书——若粮道未稳，玉玺也不过纸片。

posts.content: Liu Bei died at Baidi; I took the regent’s seal for the young heir and swore the house of Han would not end on my watch.
posts.translation: 先主崩于白帝，我受遗诏辅幼主，立誓汉室气数不能断在我辈手里。

posts.content: I pacified the south on seven captures and seven releases—wins must be moral, or they cannot last beyond a single season.
posts.translation: 我南征七擒七纵——胜须合义，否则难逾一季。

posts.content: The late Emperor entrusted me with his son at Baidi; I have grieved day and night since. Now the south is settled and our arms are ready. I write this 'Memorial on the Expedition'—I shall lead the armies north to reclaim the heartlands and restore the House of Han.
posts.translation: 先主白帝城托孤，我夙夜忧叹。今南方已定，兵甲已足，我写下《出师表》，当奖率三军，北定中原，庶竭驽钝，攘除奸凶，兴复汉室。

posts.content: The first Qishan march faltered on supply—cart tracks in snow taught me what books could not: logistics is also strategy.
posts.translation: 首出祁山因粮运受挫——雪泥上的车辙教给我书本难载的一课：辎重亦是战略。

posts.content: The roads to Qishan are rugged, making logistics grueling. I improved the 'wooden oxen and flowing horses.' Even as Sima Yi stays behind his walls, I will not give up. Reclaiming the North is my obsession and my Lord's last wish.
posts.translation: 祁山之路崎岖，运粮维艰。我改进木牛流马，纵然司马懿闭门不出，我也绝不言弃。克复中原是我的执念，更是先主的遗愿。

posts.content: I knew my days were few yet pressed the northern campaigns anyway—"bend every ounce till death"—and fell at Wuzhang Plains with my last breath in the army.
posts.translation: 我自知时日无多，仍欲北伐到底。“鞠躬尽瘁，死而后已”——最终星落五丈原，我把一口气留在了军中。
